summary: Populates syncResourcePath() with the seven resource→/tenant/{tenant}/... path mappings and substitutes ST_TENANT_ID at call time.
reason: Companion to sync-default-resources: every Pricebook path is tenant-scoped, but the generator left the path registry empty and did not handle the {tenant} placeholder (#1305 / #1332).
validated_outcome: sync resolves each resource to its tenant-scoped endpoint and writes to the local store
